rules.name: Service layer usage
rules.description: All network calls must originate from service files.
rules.explanation: Move `fetch()` calls into a dedicated service module so screens stay declarative.

rules.name: No circular dependencies
rules.description: Modules must not import each other in a cycle.

rules.name: File size & complexity thresholds
rules.description: Components ≤200 LOC, screens ≤300 LOC, ≤5 exports per file.
rules.explanation: SettingsScreen has 348 LOC — split it into smaller subcomponents.

rules.name: Layer separation (import policy)
rules.description: Imports must respect the screen → component → service flow.
rules.explanation: All cross-layer imports are within policy.

rules.name: Rules of Hooks compliance
rules.description: Hooks must be called at the top level only.
rules.explanation: All hook calls comply with the Rules of Hooks.

rules.name: Inline styles vs StyleSheet
rules.description: Avoid inline style object literals in JSX.
rules.explanation: Move inline style objects into StyleSheet.create() blocks.

rules.name: Naming conventions
rules.description: Components PascalCase, hooks useXxx, services camelCase.
rules.explanation: All filenames and default exports follow the convention.

rules.name: Native APIs in UI
rules.description: Screens and components must not call AsyncStorage, Platform directly.
rules.explanation: Wrap AsyncStorage in a hook (e.g. useStoredValue) so the UI stays declarative.
